minimum_n_thresholds.no_exceptions: No confidence-stratum exception is allowed. With N <= 10 in any primary group, STRONG_DESCRIPTIVE_SEPARATION remains blocked.
minimum_n_thresholds.threshold_rule: if any primary group has N <= minimum_n_threshold

outcomes.allowed_next_step: allow a small confirmatory diagnostic branch
outcomes.condition: Minimum-N gate is not tripped, one or two pre-entry features show strong descriptive separation, and the same pattern appears in confidence-3-only sensitivity.

outcomes.allowed_next_step: mark weak, require more data or manual review
outcomes.condition: Separation exists mainly or only in confidence-2 inferred-direction samples.

outcomes.allowed_next_step: pause Adelin v2 as a strategy candidate; optionally keep as research lab
reject the feature and mark leakage risk
outcomes.condition: Separation requires post-entry interpretation or forbidden inputs.

outcomes.allowed_next_step: allow only an optional directional/descriptive note, more sample collection, or bounded confirmatory diagnostic; do not proceed to Phase 4
outcomes.condition: Separation is ambiguous due small N, or any primary group has N <= 10. When this minimum-N gate is tripped, this is the strongest allowed verdict.
